creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please, do not use cabal-install and the FreeBSD Ports Collection at the 
same time.  If you need update for ghc-paths and you used cabal-install 
previously, then use cabal-install to update it: 

$ cabal install ghc-paths 

It will be fixed up soon by enforcing using only one of the 
alternatives.
